---
title: "Lances of Lynwood, The. By the author of “The Little Duke;” “Heartsease:” “Heir of Redclyffe;” Etc."
---

## Lances of Lynwood, The. By the author of “The Little Duke;” “Heartsease:” “Heir of Redclyffe;” Etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** .1855
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John W Parker and Son West Strand, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
